title: Maura Murray Disappearance 🚨
description: The disappearance of Maura Murray is a mysterious and unsolved case. According to the University of Massachusetts Amherst (2004), Maura was a nursing student who vanished after a car accident. Our documentary analyzes the case, citing real sources like the National Institute of Justice (2019) and the FBI. Subscribe to 'dark_files' for more true crime documentaries.

segments.voice: On February 9, 2004, Maura Murray, a 21-year-old nursing student, disappeared after a car accident in Haverhill, New Hampshire. Her disappearance has been the subject of much speculation and investigation. According to the New Hampshire State Police (2004), Maura's car was found crashed into a snowbank, but she was nowhere to be found.
segments.visual: B-roll of a snowy road in New Hampshire

segments.voice: Maura's family and friends reported that she had been acting strangely in the days leading up to her disappearance. As noted by the Journal of Forensic Sciences (2015), Maura had been experiencing personal problems and had withdrawn from her college courses. What's more, she had also been researching travel destinations online.

segments.voice: Here's the catch: despite an extensive investigation, no one knows what happened to Maura after she left the scene of the accident. The FBI (2019) has stated that they have found no evidence of foul play, but the case remains unsolved. segments.voice: But it's not that simple: the investigation into Maura's disappearance has been hindered by a lack of witnesses and evidence.
